title: crotalaria prostrata
intro: Crotalaria prostrata, also known as creeping rattlebox or scrambling crotalaria, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria prostrata include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its safety and efficacy for these uses require further research.
